title: Fix quest payout idempotency
author: its3li
pr_body_excerpt:
## Summary
- move quest payout idempotency from quest/PR/user/role scope to quest/user/role scope
- add a shared payout-key helper so the behavior is importable and testable
- guard the CLI entrypoint so importing the helper path does not execute the command

## Tests
- `npx vitest run test/quest-grant-pollen.test.ts`

gist.headline: One quest, one reward
gist.blurb: Fixed a sneaky bug in our quest payout system to make sure rewards are handed out exactly once. The hive's accounting is back in perfect order!
gist.summary: Updated the quest payout idempotency key to scope by quest, user, and role instead of including the PR, preventing duplicate pollen grants.
gist.impact: Ensures users receive their pollen rewards exactly once per quest role, tightening up the backend accounting.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a careful accountant, ensuring exactly one reward is given. The Nomnom creature receiving a single golden pollen coin. Represents idempotency and exact payouts.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny accountant visor, carefully handing exactly one glowing golden pollen coin to the round tan nomnom creature. A retro ledger book sits on a wooden desk. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
